data.text_en: No Tropical Cyclone system is observed under MMD monitoring region (Latitude: 0-20 North & Longitude: 95-130 East)
data.text_bm: Tiada sistem Siklon Tropika dicerap di dalam kawasan pemantauan MMD (Latitud: 0-20 Utara & Longitud: 95-130 Timur)

warning_issue.title_bm: Amaran Angin Kencang dan Laut Bergelora Kategori Kedua
warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.heading_en: Warning on Strong Wind and Rough Seas (Second Category)
data.text_en: Strong westerly winds of 50-60 kmph with wave height up to 4.5 metres are expected over the waters of Phuket until Thursday, 2 July 2026.
data.heading_bm: Amaran Angin kencang dan laut bergelora (Kategori Kedua)
data.text_bm: Angin kencang barat berkelajuan 50-60 kmsj dengan ombak mencapai ketinggian sehingga 4.5 meter dijangka di kawasan perairan Phuket sehingga Khamis, 2 Julai 2026.

warning_issue.title_bm: Amaran Angin Kencang dan Laut Bergelora Kategori Kedua
warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of Perlis & Kedah, East Johor, Pahang, Terengganu, Kelantan, Sarawak and Western Sabah and Labuan, Eastern Sabah until 10:00PM; Tuesday, 30 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan Perlis & Kedah, Johor Timur, Pahang, Terengganu, Kelantan, Sarawak dan Sabah Barat dan Labuan, Sabah Timur sehingga 10:00 malam; Selasa, 30 Jun 2026.

warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of Straits of Melaka, eastern part of Samui, southern part of Tioman, northern part of Condore, southern part of Bunguran, Reef North, Reef South, Layang-Layang, Labuan, Palawan, Sulu and Sulawesi until 10:00PM; Tuesday, 30 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan Selat Melaka, timur Samui, selatan Tioman, utara Condore, selatan Bunguran, Reef North, Reef South, Layang-Layang, Labuan, Palawan, Sulu dan Sulawesi sehingga 10:00 malam; Selasa, 30 Jun 2026.

warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.heading_en: Warning on Strong Wind and Rough Seas (First Category)
data.text_en: Strong westerly winds of 40-50 kmph with wave height up to 3.5 metres are expected over the waters of Northern Straits of Melaka, Samui, Condore, Reef North and Layang-Layang until Thursday, 2 July 2026.
data.heading_bm: Amaran Angin kencang dan laut bergelora (Kategori Pertama)
data.text_bm: Angin kencang barat berkelajuan 40-50 kmsj dengan ombak mencapai ketinggian sehingga 3.5 meter dijangka di kawasan perairan Selat Melaka Utara, Samui, Condore, Reef North dan Layang-Layang sehingga Khamis, 2 Julai 2026.

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the states of  Kedah  (Langkawi);  Perak  (Kuala Kangsar, Kinta, Perak Tengah and Kampar);  Kelantan  (Tumpat, Pasir Mas, Kota Bharu, Jeli, Tanah Merah, Bachok, Machang and Pasir Puteh);  Terengganu  (Dungun and Kemaman);  Pahang  (Cameron Highlands, Jerantut, Bentong, Temerloh, Maran, Kuantan, Bera, Pekan and Rompin);  Negeri Sembilan  (Jelebu, Kuala Pilah, Jempol and Tampin);  Johor  (Segamat and Mersing);  Sarawak:  Serian (Serian), Samarahan (Simunjan), Sri Aman, Betong (Pusa and Betong), Sarikei (Pakan, Julau and Meradong), Sibu, Kapit (Song and Kapit), Bintulu (Tatau), Miri (Marudi) and Limbang (Limbang); and  Sabah:  Tawau (Lahad Datu) and Sandakan until 9:00PM; Tuesday, 30 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di negeri  Kedah  (Langkawi);  Perak  (Kuala Kangsar, Kinta, Perak Tengah dan Kampar);  Kelantan  (Tumpat, Pasir Mas, Kota Bharu, Jeli, Tanah Merah, Bachok, Machang dan Pasir Puteh);  Terengganu  (Dungun dan Kemaman);  Pahang  (Tanah Tinggi Cameron, Jerantut, Bentong, Temerloh, Maran, Kuantan, Bera, Pekan dan Rompin);  Negeri Sembilan  (Jelebu, Kuala Pilah, Jempol dan Tampin);  Johor  (Segamat dan Mersing);  Sarawak:  Serian (Serian), Samarahan (Simunjan), Sri Aman, Betong (Pusa dan Betong), Sarikei (Pakan, Julau dan Meradong), Sibu, Kapit (Song dan Kapit), Bintulu (Tatau), Miri (Marudi) dan Limbang (Limbang); dan  Sabah:  Tawau (Lahad Datu) dan Sandakan sehingga 9:00 malam; Selasa, 30 Jun 2026.
